name: Crockpot Perfect Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a fork, mix all ingredients except the catsup and pepper rings.
2. Shape into a loaf and place in a greased crockpot.
3. Top with catsup and pepper rings.
4. Cover and cook on high for 1 hour, then on low for 6 to 8 hours.
5. Quartered potatoes coated with butter may also be cooked with this recipe. A dash of Paprika will give them a nice browned look (same cooking time).
